Sandbox_PN_EnableNotifications_tooltip: Enable the toast notification system. When disabled, all notification calls are silently ignored.
Sandbox_PN_DefaultDuration_tooltip: How long each toast notification stays on screen before auto-dismissing. Individual notifications can override this value. Range: 2-30 seconds.
Sandbox_PN_MaxVisible_tooltip: Maximum number of toast notifications shown on screen simultaneously. Additional notifications are queued and shown as slots become available. Range: 1-5.
Sandbox_PN_ShowProgressBar_tooltip: Show a countdown progress bar at the bottom of each toast notification indicating time remaining before auto-dismiss.
Sandbox_PN_ToastPosition_tooltip: Screen corner where toast notifications appear.
Sandbox_PN_ToastWidth_tooltip: Width of each toast notification in pixels. Range: 200-500.
Sandbox_PN_EnableSounds_tooltip: Play a sound effect when a notification appears. Only applies to notifications that specify a sound.
Sandbox_PN_AnimationSpeed_tooltip: Speed of slide-in and slide-out animations as a percentage. 100 is normal speed, 200 is twice as fast, 50 is half speed. Range: 50-200.
